title: Heptapleurum heterocladum
taxonomy: Heptapleurum heterocladum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is a member of the genus Heptapleurum, which is closely related to the genus Polyscias. Heptapleurum heterocladum is often used as an ornamental plant due to its unique foliage and ability to thrive in shaded environments. The classification of Heptapleurum heterocladum is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic studies.
